requirement_topic.en: EMC and Power Quality Evidence — IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 for Timor-Leste PV Projects
requirement_topic.zh: EMC和电能质量证据——东帝汶光伏逆变器项目的IEC 62920与IEC 61000
requirement_topic.zht: EMC和電能品質證據——東帝汶光伏逆變器項目的IEC 62920與IEC 61000

summary.en: For Timor-Leste PV inverter projects, EMC and power-quality evidence should be aligned to IEC 62920 and IEC 61000-series requirements. Timor-Leste market documents are not yet mature and largely project-driven, so installers and EPC teams should confirm report scope for each project before commissioning.
summary.zh: 在东帝汶光伏逆变器项目中，EMC与电能质量证据应按IEC 62920和IEC 61000系列要求对齐。东帝汶市场文件尚不成熟且以项目为主导，因此在调试前应对每个项目确认报告范围。
summary.zht: 在東帝汶光伏逆變器項目中，EMC與電能品質證據應按IEC 62920與IEC 61000系列要求對齊。東帝汶市場文件尚未成熟且以項目為主導，因此在調試前應對每個項目確認報告範圍。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62920 — Photovoltaic power generating systems — EMC requirements and test methods for power conversion equipment
IEC 61000 series — Electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
Timor-Leste ANE- and EDTL-level technical submission requirements for connected PV equipment
Project-specific grid and installation assumptions for 220/380 V 50 Hz

summary.en: Chinese files usually rely on GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 with CNAS EMC reports. These can support engineering review, but they are not automatic substitutes for Timor-Leste project documentation that is aligned with IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 expectations.
summary.zh: 中国资料通常依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及CNAS EMC报告。可用于技术审查支持，但不能自动替代与IEC 62920和IEC 61000对齐的东帝汶项目文件要求。
summary.zht: 中國資料通常依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004及CNAS EMC報告。可用於技術審查支持，但不能自動替代與IEC 62920和IEC 61000對齊的東帝汶項目文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范

gap.en: Gap: project-level evidence in Timor-Leste generally requires explicit IEC-clause mapping, especially where tropical climate drives installation layout, heat, and protection assumptions. Exporters should obtain EN- and Timor-Leste-relevant EMC mapping before treating Chinese domestic evidence as project-complete.
gap.zh: 差距：东帝汶项目层面通常要求明确的IEC条款映射，尤其在热带气候影响下的安装布局、散热和保护假设。出口商在视中国国内证据为项目完整时应先补齐ECE/Timor-Leste相关映射。
gap.zht: 差距：東帝汶項目層面通常要求明確的IEC條款映射，尤其在熱帶氣候影響下的安裝佈局、散熱和保護假設。出口商在將中國國內證據視為項目完整前應先補齊與ANE/東帝汶相關的映射。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where project owners, ANE, or EDTL require EMC and power-quality evidence for grid connection
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese EMC evidence supports domestic acceptance but is not sufficient by itself for Timor-Leste project approval

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare project-specific IEC 62920 and IEC 61000 evidence for Timor-Leste PV inverter deployments instead of relying only on domestic Chinese EMC reports. Ensure mapping coverage for coastal heat-humidity and installation layout assumptions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对东帝汶光伏逆变器应用应准备项目化的IEC 62920与IEC 61000证据，不应仅依赖中国国内EMC报告。应确保对沿海温热湿环境和安装布局假设进行对应映射。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對東帝汶太陽能逆變器應用應準備項目化的IEC 62920與IEC 61000證據，不應僅依賴中國國內EMC報告。應確保對沿海溫熱濕環境和安裝佈局假設進行對應映射。
